banner.label: DB 'Hunter Dossier' ; ARCH, TRANSMISSION, PRECISION
header.subtitle: MOV role, DEV_TRAINER ; ASP.NET & Angular & Symfony
snippets.transmission.title: PROC transmission_and_teaching
snippets.transmission.content: PUSH knowledge; CALL share; TEST reasoning, CLEAR; JNZ level_up; MOV exp_years, 9; CMP commitment, MAX; JGE train_next_gen ; THE BEST EXERCISE IS SHARING
snippets.stack.title: PROC stack_excellence
snippets.stack.content: MOV AX, ANGULAR; MOV BX, DOTNET; CMP modern, TRUE; CMP robust, TRUE; CMP scalable, TRUE; JGE build_maintainable_apps ; CHOICES ALIGNED WITH AMBITION
snippets.architecture.title: PROC security_and_architecture
snippets.architecture.content: CMP arch, MONOLITH; JE evaluate; CMP arch, MICRO; JE evaluate; CMP arch, HEXA; JE evaluate; CALL find_best_fit ; NOT JUST A SOLUTION — THE RIGHT ONE
snippets.opensource.title: PROC open_source_volunteer
snippets.opensource.content: MOV passion, DEV; CALL contribute_oss; CALL mentor_youth; OR AX, volunteer_flag; TEST impact, REAL; JNZ tech_is_useful ; MORE THAN A JOB
snippets.quality.title: PROC quality_responsibility
snippets.quality.content: MOV standards, STRICT; CALL tech_watch; CMP quality, HIGH; JL keep_improving; OUTPUT clean_code; OUTPUT reliable_code; RET ; DISCIPLINE ENABLES BETTER DECISIONS
